ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personal_information_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of PI */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Government-issued identifiers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical organization) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_information_examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example of PI */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of PI */,
  "example_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the example */,
  "example_format" TEXT /* Format of the example (e.g., numeric, alphanumeric) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the example was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the example was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_information_examples_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pi_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of PI */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the sources (e.g., Directly from you, Your employer) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose of PI collection */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the business purpose (e.g., Policy Administration, Marketing analytics) */,
  "purpose_category" TEXT /* Category of purpose (e.g., operational, marketing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the purpose was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the purpose was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_sharing" (
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party category */,
  "third_party_description" TEXT /* Description of third parties (e.g., Client, Vendor/service providers) */,
  "third_party_type" TEXT /* Type of third party (e.g., service provider, business partner) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the third party was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the third party was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("third_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the PI category */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of PI */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business purpose for collection */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to third-party sharing category */,
  "data_retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period for the PI (in months) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the management entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the management entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_party_sharing ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES business_purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES pi_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, Data Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the PI category */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view the PI category */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit the PI category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access control entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the PI category affected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of PI */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to third-party sharing category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_party_sharing ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_information_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES pi_sources ("source_id")
)
